programme.desc: After foiling an attempted bank robbery, an ordinary salesman (Jackie Chan) becomes an instant hero. His sudden fame also reveals he's the latest in a long line of professional spies, and about to become entangled in a mystery only he can unravel.

programme.title: Operation Condor
programme.desc: Jackie Chan ignites the big screen as the world's greatest secret agent, code name Condor. Sent to track down stolen Nazi gold, he is pursued by a ruthless band of treasure-hunting terrorists on a globe-spanning quest to reach the bounty first!

programme.title: Operation Condor II: The Armour Of The Gods
programme.desc: Jackie Chan is a fortune hunter whose ex-girlfriend is kidnapped by an evil cult! Things kick into high gear when her fiancée, an old friend of Jackie’s, asks him for help in securing the kidnappers’ lone demand: the priceless Armor of The Gods!

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Casa Roma en Lancaster, California. Aunque su barra está repleta, el comedor de Casa Roma está vacío.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Mojito's, un restaurante cubano en Brooklyn. Los dueños compraron el restaurante como recién casados, pero ahora tienen siete años de un matrimonio y un negocio que se desmorona.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Ridgewood, Nueva Jersey, para rejuvenecer a Bazzini, un restaurante italiano obstaculizado por un servicio lento y un personal de cocina mediocre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Filadelfia, Pensilvania, para visitar Hot Potato Cafe. Encuentra a un dueño agotado por la pasión que ha creado un ambiente tóxico lleno de negatividad.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ramsay descubre que el restaurante mexicano Mama Rita's sufre de una cocina desorganizada. Mientras tanto, la dueña puede tener que sacrificar una amistad para salvar su negocio.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay encuentra una segunda ubicación fallida de un restaurante familiar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Lido di Manhattan, un local italiano con una cocina antiestética y un propietario sin experiencia. Está tan horrorizado que cierra el lugar temporalmente.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por un restaurante francés y descubre que él y el jefe de cocina tienen una formación culinaria similar. Sin embargo, el chef niega la mala calidad de la comida de su restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Anna Vincenzo's, un restaurante familiar en Boca Raton, Florida. Se entera de que el obstinado dueño no acepta el cambio. Después de que se ignoran sus ideas, Ramsay se marcha.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Fleming, un restaurante danés en Miami. El obstinado dueño no quiere actualizar el lugar y Ramsay descubre algo en la hielera que lo lleva a cerrar el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita el Pabellón Español en Nueva Jersey. Descubre que un par de hermanos en disputa están llevando el restaurante al suelo. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay llega a un restaurante endeudado propiedad de dos ex meseras y las cosas están tan mal que Ramsay realiza una intervención para abordar el tema del liderazgo.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1980, Michigan resident Shannon Mohr died in what her new husband, David Davis, reported to be a horseback riding accident. After her death, Shannon's family reported that Davis seemed far from grief-stricken.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, construction manager Darrell North was found dead in his work trailer in Ft. Worth, Texas. When investigators arrived, they found that he had been stabbed 46 times, indicating a personal relationship between the victim and the attacker.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray was charged in her husband's death. Her son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school, studied all of the evidence and, eventually, discovered the truth of what really happened between his parents.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey requests extra training from RJ, and ends up doing seemingly menial housework for the mentor. The ancient spirit of the buffalo is harnessed for evil, as Camille brings about Buffalord.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The 5 Fingers of Poisons (lizardlike Gakko, cobraesque Naja, centipedish Rantipede, scorpionic Stingerella, and froggy Toady) are brought forth by Dai Shi, who doubly stuns the Rangers by finally revealing his human form to a familiar face.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The second Finger of Poison, Gakko, uses his wall-sticking skills to humiliate the Rangers when they try to face him on his own turf.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The friendship between Theo and Lily is tested by the Yellow Ranger's budding platonic relationship with Casey.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With RJ out of town, Casey is left in charge of Jungle Karma Pizza. Instead of asserting himself as the boss, he adds the power of responsibility equally to Theo and Lily, which quickly creates chaos in the pizza parlor.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The heavily armored Pangolin proves to be too tough of a nut for the Rangers to crack. Their only hope is a powerful weapon called the Jungle Mace, which lies in the hands of retired Pai Zhuq teacher, Master Phant.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey loses his $5 tip to a young boy named Josh, who wants to buy himself a kite. Can Casey teach Josh that the easy way isn't always the right way, while also figuring out how to put a stop to the slippery Slickagon?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Theo spreads his focus too thin, leading his teammates to question his effectiveness in battle.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Thanks to Carnisoar's training, Jarrod has become more ruthless than ever. Camille is pushed aside for the last time, and thanks to some advice from Lily, decides to get a new master.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey anxiously awaits the arrival of his second master, but RJ begins to feel forgotten as a result. It gets worse for him when the master of the Shark technique arrives, and turns out to be his estranged father, Master Finn!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After another victorious battle against Camille's monsters, the Rangers feel they are unstoppable. RJ warns them about being overconfident. He tells them to train on their basic stances.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With RJ captured, the Rangers must travel to the spirit world to find the last 3 remaining masters. Theo, Lily, and Casey must face their own childhood fears in order to pass their test.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Everyone is still making fun of Lily for being too nice. After a battle with Porcupongo, Lily is fed up with being so nice and shows her bad side. Lily becomes a rude customer at JKP and refuses to help the other Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After his last battle with Dai Shi, RJ has major problems controlling his animal spirit. He turns into a werewolf and becomes a big threat to anyone around him. RJ learns to lean on his friends and not run away from them when he has a problem.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey really has grown up from being a cub at Pai Zhuq. He's taken initiative and stepped up to being the leader of the group. But now with RJ as a Ranger, things are a little different. Casey feels like a cub all over again.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Grizzaka sends an evil spirit to cause trouble between RJ and his animal spirit again. The hero in RJ causes him to save Flit. RJ tells the spy to go home but Flit tells of his own curse.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Dominic was sent out by Master Mao to find purpose for his life. He finds out that RJ and the others are really Power Rangers and he wants to join them. He now knows that this is his purpose in life.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Jarrod has found the Rhino Nexus. All he needs is the Control Dagger key to tap into the power. Dominic is startled by a dream of Master Mao telling him to protect the Control Dagger as it holds the key to his destiny.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With Control Dagger in hand, Dai Shi aims to unlock the Nexus for himself. The Overlords refuse to let such power fall into the hands of the Rangers or Dai Shi.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts were a notorious force in the Beast Wars. The crystal eyes hold the power to bring back these Phantom Beasts. Our heroes must protect these eyes before Dai Shi or the Overlords resurrect such evil beasts.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts have been brought back to life. Dai Shi has them prove their loyalty by capturing the three masters. The Phantom Beasts capture the masters and use the masters to create the Spirit Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts control the masters and call forth the Spirit Rangers. They look and fight exactly like Power Rangers. Our heroes are in for a real fight as they face the spirits of their own masters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Spirit Rangers could be the end of our heroes if something isn't done. RJ takes the risk of destroying his father. Trusting his instincts, he finds that his dad was prepared if this should happen.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Rangers get sucked into a cheesy game show about the past season. Camille hosts the game show and a wrong answer could result in being cancelled!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury

programme.desc: The day has arrived for the three to get their master stripes. Lily and Theo pass the test to become masters. Casey does not. He wanders off to think about his loss and comes across Jarrod saving Camille from Dai Shi's monsters.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay despierta a los Chefs restantes en medio de la noche y les ordena que preparen una cena de espaguetis para los bomberos hambrientos. Los perdedores deben lavar y encerar los camiones de bomberos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los competidores deben crear perros calientes de proporciones perfectas para las celebridades Drew Lachey, John O'Hurley, Tom Green, Melinda Clarke, Christopher 'Kid' Reid y Kristy Swanson.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce Chefs restantes deberán planificar un saludo gastronómico por el regreso de un marine americano. El equipo perdedor tendrá que limpiar y decorar la fiesta de Tana Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes deben crear comidas de tres platos que sumen solo 700 calorías. Los ganadores fueron a la playa con la jugadora de voleibol de playa Annett Davis.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes tiran los dados para determinar qué ingredientes usar para su plato de desafío. El equipo ganador gana un viaje a Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los nueve Chefs restantes realizan una prueba de sabor a ciegas. Los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay en un comedor completamente oscuro donde no pueden ver lo que están comiendo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes hacen crepes. Los ganadores cenarán en un restaurante francés mientras los perdedores se preparan para un servicio de cena con temática francesa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los medallistas olímpicos de invierno Sasha Cohen y Jonny Moseley aparecen como jueces invitados. Para este desafío, todos los ingredientes deben provenir de Whistler, B.C.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Baby Genius

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When the Baroness acquires a legendary conch and uses its mind-controlling siren song on all the males among Joe and Cobra's ranks, it's up to Scarlett, Lady Jaye and Cover Girl to end her reign of terror.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Tokyo is the site of a world economic conference - and Cobra's latest target for chaos. When Cobra devises a plan to destroy the whole city with an earthquake, the Joes are sent in to stop them.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. When G.I. Joe captures a secret Cobra explosive, Cobra responds by kidnapping several Joe family members and brainwashing them into fighting a battle for its return. It's a strike force the Joes are afraid to fight or harm.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. The Joes are caught off-balance when their very families and personal lives are used against them. To defeat Cobra, retrieve the explosive, and rescue their loved ones, the Joes not only have to be tough, but creative too.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Jim Jones surprises Chrissy in Miami with a touching proposal. Meanwhile, Teirra Mari & Olivia are both being courted by producer Rico Love. It's a three-way that creates instant tensions. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Olivia meets with influential DJ Funk Master Flex hoping she'll be able to move forward by confronting her harshest critics. Meanwhile, there may be a light at the end of the tunnel for her record deal quest. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Jim & Chrissy confront the inevitable: will they marry or split up? Is Olivia finally on the path to success? And how exactly will Yandy re-position herself now that she's dropped her number one client after 7 years. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: In revealing, one-on-one interviews, all of the Love and Hip Hop stars speak frankly about which cast members they get along with, who they hate, and answer all of the burning questions that the fans want to know. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Exes Tahiry and Joe have some unfinished business and are trying to redefine their friendship. Rich and Erica have taken their relationship to a new level and Yandy has deals with her expanding family. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Joe puts Raqi in her place for stepping over the line and ends their friendship. Jen and Cons celebrate their sons' 1st birthday but argue over religious differences. Rich and Erica are quickly learning business and pleasure don't mix. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Cons and Jen deal with the conflicting role religion plays in their relationship. Mendeecees and Yandy wonder if they are both ready to take the next step in their relationship. Joe continues his path of recovery. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Erica and Olivia meet to settle the score. Tahiry continues to be a part of Joe's support team. Yandy and Mendeecees face a most difficult time as parents. Jen finds a new friend in Raqi, but then girls' night out goes bad. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Tahiry and Joe continue on their path of trying to work on friendship. Yandy gets out of the doghouse with Mendeecees. Rich reluctantly agrees to Erica doing a ballad as her first single. Jen and Raqi have a test interview with Hot97. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Rich gives Erica an ultimatum in her career. Kaylin takes a stand regarding Joe and Tahiry's relationship. Cons sticks up for Jen by defending his girl. Mendeecees takes matters into his own hands the only way he knows how. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: Climbing up into the cloud forest and peeking inside a waypoint for migrating birds.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Feeling the love in the strange-but-heartwarming partnerships between some of Earth's oddest creatures; diving deep to see strange animals, from snapping shrimp to wolf eels, offer a hand to their fellow ocean-going weirdos to ensure mutual survival.

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: The red fox of Prince Edward Island.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: For people who live on active volcanoes, life has an element of impermanence to it.

programme.title: Wild Korea
programme.desc: The notorious demilitarized zone of Korea exists on the boundary of two warring nations for nearly 70 years; however, amid the barbed wire fences and thousands of land mines, a unique natural wonderland coexists alongside the ashes of war.

programme.title: High Life at Low Temperatures
programme.desc: Trek up the peaks of Austria's Little Siberia for a look at the rhythms of icy alpine life. See where the region's streams begin, observe eagles and ermines feasting on summer's bounty, and marvel at salamanders' birthing cycle below the treeline.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Cape Town, South Africa is home to twenty types of frogs, but many are threatened by urban development; following western leopard toads on their tenuous journey to breed in the city's shrinking wetlands.

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: New Zealand's dark fjords harbor creatures normally found in the deep; as winter approaches, bottlenose dolphins must escape their freezing fjord, while in a mountain river, a longfin eel heeds the call of the sea.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Japan is home to two of the top five most dangerous volcanoes on the planet.

programme.title: Wild Korea
programme.desc: Korea is known as a modern, high-tech nation, but beyond the bustle of the cities exists a land of stunning natural beauty and remarkable wildlife including the beautiful goshawk, the bottleneck dolphin and the curious raccoon dog.

programme.title: Land of Gremlins
programme.desc: A family of lemurs in the rainforest of Mantadia National Park.

programme.title: Land of Gremlins
programme.desc: A look at how Madagascar's species have evolved to exploit their various habitats.

programme.title: Webs & Wings: Nature's Tiny Ballet
programme.desc: Unlock the vital role these feared hunters and spinners play in Earth's ecology.

programme.title: Wild Austria: Created by Water
programme.desc: Winter is a tough time for creatures in the Austrian Alps; as spring comes, millions of migratory birds flock to the lowlands around Lake Neusiedl.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #10 Tokyo Crisis
programme.desc: When Lupin and his bandit buddies attempt to steal a set of historically significant photographic plates, it turns out they're not the only ones with eyes on the prize in this thievish tale of mayhem and millionaires.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 6/4/09: Giants' ageless lefty, Randy Johnson, 45, joins MLB's exclusive 300 win club by twirling six-innings of two-hit, one-run ball against the Nationals during the first game of a double-header, thus cementing his place in baseball history.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The final spot in the 2009 postseason would come down a 163rd game between the Twins and the Tigers at the Metrodome. A back-and-forth game saw both teams take leads late. In the end, the Twins walked it off in the 12th inning of an instant classic.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/25/2009: Andy Pettitte pitches into the 7th inning for the win in Game 6 of the 2009 American League Championship Series to lead the Yankees to a 5-2 victory over the Angels.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 5/29/10: Roy Halladay puts together a masterful performance against the Marlins, facing 27 batters and retiring them all in the 20th perfect game in MLB history.

programme.title: This Week in Baseball
programme.desc: 7/18/91: On this edition of This Week in Baseball, four pitchers from the Orioles blank the A's, Darryl Strawberry takes former teammate David Cone yard, and much more!

programme.title: MST3K: The Skydivers
programme.desc: The villains of Deep 13 force Mike and the 'bots to watch Why Study Industrial Arts? (1956) and The Skydivers (1963) after challenging them to a swing choir contest.

programme.title: MST3K: The Undead
programme.desc: A woman gets hypnotized back into her Dark Age'd past life while Tom takes a crack at being an observer.

programme.title: MST3K: Time Chasers
programme.desc: A college professor and a reporter go through time in a modified light plane to stop a corporation from using his invention to accidentally create a dystopian future.

programme.title: MST3K: Tormented
programme.desc: In Tormented, jazz pianist Tom Stewart, soon to marry the woman he loves, watches former love Vi Mason fall from a lighthouse and does not save her. Vi’s spirit returns and begins to torment Tom at his every step.

programme.title: MST3K: Track Of The Moon Beast
programme.desc: In Track of the Moon Beast (1976), a mineralogist is hit by a meteor which causes him to transform into a lizard-monster.

programme.title: MST3K: Women Of The Prehistoric Planet
programme.desc: Our intrepid hosts are trapped between Isaac Asimov's Literary Doomsday Device and Robert Ito from Quincy M.E. (1976) in a fur caveman outfit.

programme.title: MST3K: Zombie Nightmare
programme.desc: A hit-and-run victim is brought back from the dead by a voodoo doctor, and then seeks revenge.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A group of showgirls washes up on a deserted island after their plane crashes. Soon they discover the island is home to a large, radioactive spider.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina tries to save her friendship with Lauren after accusing her of hooking up with Justin. Spencer and Stephanie visit their grandmother who is fed up with their fighting.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Whitney gets offered a chance at her dream job in her New York. Lauren grows nostalgic when she learns her parents are selling their house in Laguna Beach, and Stephanie turns to Spencer for help with Cameron.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Spencer and Heidi ignore the concerns of their families and run away to Mexico to elope. Whitney takes a chance at a dream job in New York City and says goodbye to Lauren and her life in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Lauren and Heidi have a run-in, they put their feud aside and remember why they used to be friends. Spencer and Heidi deal with the fallout of their elopement and Justin shocks Audrina when he whisks her away to Palm Springs.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Heidi crashes Laurens surprise birthday party, the two old friends cry about their disintegrated friendship. Spencer starts a violent fistfight when Cameron accuses him of picking up a bartender.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Spencer's flirtatious ways lead Heidi home to Colorado, where she reconnects with an old boyfriend. Lauren gives Stephanie a piece of her mind for inviting Heidi to her birthday party. Spencer ends a long silence with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: After Heidi catches Spencer at a nightclub with Stacie the bartender, she demand's they go to couple's therapy. Lauren puts her reputation on the line when she gets Stephanie an internship at People's Revolution.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina tries to get over Justin by setting her sights on Brody. Heidi drags Spencer kicking and screaming to couples therapy. When Stephanie screws up at People's Revolution, Lauren threatens to fire her.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina tries to get over Justin by hooking up with Brody when the girls crash the boy's surf trip to Hawaii. Heidi's virgin ex-boyfriend comes to visit and she hopes some of his values will rub off on Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina is heartbroken when Brody's girlfriend confronts her about Hawaii, and Brody does nothing to stop it. Heidi intercepts a text message from Stacie to Spencer and goes to a nightclub to confront her.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Spencer tries to save his relationship with Heidi by asking her cowboy dad's permission to get married. Lauren must fire Stephanie from People's Revolution, risking their friendship.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Lauren thinks twice about going to Heidi's wedding after Spencer finally apologizes. Brody refuses to risk his relationship with Jayde to save his friendship with Audrina, and Stephanie confronts Kelly Cutrone.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: In Lauren's final episode, she must decide whether she's willing to forgive Spencer in order to be there for Heidi on the day of her "princess" wedding. The entire cast shows up and is shocked by a guest no one saw coming.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Comienza la despedida de Mykonos por todo lo alto. Primera parada en un club de playa donde Elettra demuestra a Abraham que es algo posesiva. Tras una cena típica griega, bailes incluidos, terminan la noche de Mykonos en una discoteca

programme.title: La Venganza Extra (LAS)
programme.desc: En este episodio se repasarán las escenas y situaciónes más polemicas vistas en el estreno de la semana de La Venganza de los Ex VIP S2.

programme.title: La Venganza Extra (LAS)
programme.desc: En este episodio se repasarán las escenas y situaciónes más polemicas vistas en el estreno de la semana de La Venganza de los Ex VIP S2.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos repasan los mejores momentos de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Ellos verán las mejores fiestas, las peleas, los momentos más importantes de sus vacaciones y lo que eso conlleva

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Nuevas vacaciones comienzan para la familia más disfuncional. Serán en Rimini, Italia la tierra de la matadora de Italia, Elettra.El primer episodio sorprende a los Shores con muchos cambios dentro de la familia y con una casa espectacular.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todo parece indicar que el desmadre este año lo empiezan a poner los nuevos discípulos. Victor trata de seducir a Elettra, Isaac juega con Adela para ver quien tiene el control y Ferre tontea todo el tiempo seduciendo a Eva hasta que se pelean.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega el boss, es italiano y tiene carácter, comienza regañándolos y los envía a trabajar crudos. Isaac está de cumpleaños y recibe muchos regalos, incluido el de Adela. Elettra come una pizza que la pone cachonda. Una gran alegría llega a Rimini.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Hay tensión en la casa, Adela está de malas con Elettra que no entiende cual es el problema, pero el problema es que ella se está ligando a Isaac adelante e Adela y a este parece no importarle.Victor y Potro se dicen sus verdades.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Karime y Elettra arman un plan para ligarse a Ferre y a Isaac delante de Adela y Eva porque no les gusta su actitud irrespetuosa, estas dos están un poco sorprendidas por lo que pasa y no saben bien como enfrentarlo.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones van a tope para todos menos para Eva que parece no disfrutar lo que está viviendo, ni la llegada de su amigo Pietro logra sacarle el mood negativo a la francesa de fuego. Al mismo tiempo la casa está en shock por un chisme.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los shore llegan a Roma. Hay discusiones por ver quién se queda con quién en el hotel. Potro está molesto porque Karime y Elettra se quedan con Víctor y se roban el cuarto del amor. Toda la belleza romana invadida porn los shores que cantan.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Veracruz Casual

programme.title: Veracruz Casual

programme.title: Veracruz Casual

programme.title: Veracruz Casual

programme.title: Veracruz Casual

programme.title: Veracruz Casual

programme.desc: Miranda says that her fiancée Charlie is guilty of cheating and taking drugs. Has he been cheating with Lisa, Miranda's worst enemy? He says that he stayed a couple of days at Lisa's house to make Miranda jealous! Can this relationship survive?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Steaming mom Mary confronts her daughter Tina for stealing her man and Chrissy confronts Robert’s other woman, Anna! Rere confronts Arthur’s other woman…who is actually a man!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jessyca thinks that Shon and Mellisa may be having a secret relationship. Christine is here to tell her friend Chelsie that Carl isn't the faithful boyfriend she thinks he is. Plus, Char's man, June, gets revenge by having sex with Erin.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jada says that one lover is not enough. She wants to confront her boyfriend to tell him that there's someone else. Next Brandy's husband has moved out to be with his mistress, Rachel. Then Danielle confesses to Rashanda that she is the other woman.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Khloe is ready to reveal to Jamal that she may not be the woman he thinks she is. Nick is here to confront his wife Barbara and the man she’s been sleeping with, Jason. Plus, Danielle is ready to confront her friend Amy for spreading lies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests say they're ready to come clean. Yolando regrets sleeping with her best friend’s boyfriend and Cameron has been hiding a secret from his roommates.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Johnny wants his girlfriend Aimee to accept him for who he is. Then, Maya comes on the show to confront her boyfriend Eric about his tendencies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Preston is ready to ditch Jessica for cheating, but he’s the actual cheater! Then, can KB justify falling for Krystal’s god-sister even with a very open relationship?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Clint wants his wife's girlfriend, Anna, to back off! Next Kelly's husband pleads with her to take him back. But Kelly's mind is made up, she's staying with her husband's brother!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sherry is furious with her ex-best friend Kim who seduced her son Nick. Then, Angie confronts her husband Dale's lover Bobbie who tries to come between them!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Today Mark will be forced to choose between his lover, Amy, and his wife. Next Michelle is here to dump her lover for her ex-boyfriend, Frankie. Later, Erikka lives with her boyfriend but her heart belongs to her friend, Larry.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Amigos y familiares se niegan a aceptar el matrimonio entre personas del mismo sexo! Martín no quiere que su hijo se case con su novio. Abril quiere recuperar a su ex, ¡pero está enamorado de un hombre! ¿Quién tiene la última palabra?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: No hay peor momento para pelearse con la familia que durante las vacaciones. ¡Nuestros viejos amigos Donna y su marido infiel Richard nos acompañan en festividades!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Bambi nos da una rara y honesta perspectiva de su ultra exclusivo estilo de vida en Los Ángeles. Tiffany se enfrenta a C.T. por un feo negocio.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas parejas decidieron hacer un trío que terminó en un embarazo. Ahora que los bebés han nacido, estos hombres niegan ser los padres. Hoy se verán obligados a reconocer la verdad.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estos invitados dicen que están seguros de saber quién es el padre de sus hijos, pero necesitan una prueba de ADN para comprobarlo. Ahora los resultados están a punto de descubrirse, pero ¿serán los resultados que esperaban?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Don y Amy contrataron a Jessica para cuidar a su hijo, Steven. Años más tarde, Jessica dice que Steven es el padre de su hijo. Además, Marisol ha hecho 16 pruebas de ADN para encontrar al padre de su hijo. ¿La prueba número 17 será la definitiva?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de hacer 5 pruebas de ADN, Rebecca regresa con 2 hombres más para encontrar al padre de su nuevo bebé. Después, Don y su esposa se alegraron al descubrir que su hijo no era el padre del bebé de Jessica, pero ella cree que Don es el padre.

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario sale del carro y busca a Rosaura. Luisana toma la pistola y dice que con ella si podría matar definitivamente a Camelia, ya que ella no hará feliz a Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia presiona a Eva para que le diga si efectivamente Luis Mario se enamoró de Rosaura, pero ella no se lo confirma y en cambio la amenaza con hacerle saber a Luis Mario el secreto de su vida.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia abraza a Luis Mario y le exige que vuelvan a ser la pareja feliz de antes, ya que ella lo quiere recuperar. Karina se fastidia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Eva discuten por Rosaura, cuando llega Luisana. Eva descarga su mal humor con ella y cuando Luis Mario se aleja, la amenaza con botarla de la casa por Eduarda y Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le cuenta todo a doña Cruz. Doña Cruz ofrece su ayuda para que Rosaura se pueda vengar de los que le hicieron daño. Camelia y Luis Mario están haciendo el amor.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Iván le informa a Rosaura que Luis Mario está muy grave. Despues, Rosaura quiere ir donde Luis Mario. Griselda le cuenta a María Julia lo que está pasando en la casa con Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia le forma un escándalo a Rosaura en pleno hospital. Iván cuenta la historia de su mamá y de su hermana pero sin decir nombres. Karina y María Julia siguen divirtiéndose en Orlando.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Las fotos presentadas a Luis Mario, por Eva, lo hacen creer en lo que le está diciendo, que Rosaura lo engaño con Julián. Rosaura le cuenta a Samuel lo que le pasó con Julián y el fotógrafo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia lee la carta donde Anselmo le dice a Rosaura que busque a su abuela y que no se quede con María Julia. Gabriel nuevamente se le declara a Eva y ella se burla de él. Él la besa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia le pregunta a Rosaura como debe llamarla, si Gabriela o Rosaura. Ella le comenta que se cambió el nombre para que los Arismendi no supieran más de ella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia está decidida a no darle el divorcio a Luis Mario. Suena el teléfono y es Patricio. Luis Mario y Gabriel se van al spa a pasar un rato. Patricio amenaza a Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia le cuenta a Rosaura por petición de Samuel quienes son las impostoras. María Julia y Karina están en el parque de diversiones de Orlando.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Tensions run high when a slave-owning Celestial Dragon washes up on Fish-Man Island. His former captives cry for out for blood, but Queen Otohime sees it as a chance to mend fences between the gilled and non-gilled!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After an agonizing absence, Queen Otohime returns to her people with exciting news. Unfortunately, a horrific act of violence derails the queen's mission and changes life on Fish-Man Island forever.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei and Luffy continue their standoff, the New Fish-Man pirates go on a rampage, and Hordy begins to experience startling side effects from his pill-popping habit!

programme.desc: Hordy's rampant use of the energy steroid makes him bigger, stronger, and scarier than ever before! The Fish-Man princes join the battle, but even they may not be strong enough to stop Hordy's onslaught!

programme.title: Wolfblood
programme.desc: Jana and the pack ask for Emilia's support now that they are certain what the conspiracy against them is all about.

programme.title: Wolfblood
programme.desc: Unable to help Selina's parents, Jana resolves to find a way to help the wolfblood cause, starting with Project Genesis.

programme.title: Wolfblood
programme.desc: Jana's rescue mission to save Selina doesn't go to plan so she promises Imara she'll fetch TJ and Matei to leave for Norway.

programme.title: Wolfblood
programme.desc: Jana races back to the city to meet with Whitewood, Jeffries and Katrina who share their insights on Project Genesis.

programme.title: Wolfblood
programme.desc: A girl is home-alone on a full moon when she hears a noise outside... She bravely goes to see what it is and is confronted by two wolves escaping from inside her house!

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: When a stranger gives Arthur the power to summon the dead, the king finds himself torn between head and heart.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: With Princess Mithian as the perfect bait, Morgana conjures a deception.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: In the inky depths of an ancient pool, three soothsayers cast a dark judgment upon the king of Camelot.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Invasion Mars
programme.desc: For over 50 years we have bombarded Mars with our probes and landers. Spying from orbit to map terrain, finding her strengths and weaknesses. The time nearing for the full scale invasion of the planet- when humans walk on Mars and claim it for their own.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Amazing Cassini spacecraft and its sibling lander, Huygens, have now concluded their scientific studies, bringing back years of data. Now, Juno piercing the cloak of Jupiter and her distant relative New Horizons at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: We have been observing Earth for 40 years now, in the last 20 we have focus with intensity on the planet with new technologies and capabilities, we have accumulated a mass of data that is now revealing a complex and ever changing living planet.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The interface between Earth and space is the Ionosphere, a region of rarified gas and charged particles. It is very important for radio communications, radar, satellite signals and global positioning. Yet we know so little about it.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: New satellites are being launched to continue detailed observations of Earth and its oceans and ice caps. They are finding that climate change is accelerating and they have the data to prove it.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: NASA's Parker Solar Probe Mission is on its way and will be shortly followed by Europe's Solar probe Mission. No spacecraft has traveled so fast or so close to a star before. The hope is to reveal the source of the solar winds that affect Earth.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The commercial space flight companies are edging closer and closer to flight readiness. Paying customers will soon be launching into space; tourist revenue is projected to be a major stepping stone toward space exploration and colonization.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The ESA-JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch. The target is Mercury which has been too long neglected; this mission will shed new light on this strange world of light and dark.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid Sample Return Mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock, ready to dip down to acquire its sample. The return of asteroid material to Earth will aid scientists in the development of planetary defense systems.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes, Gaia and TESS, are in orbit with their primary missions coming to a close. They will be joined by the James Webb Telescope, and together they will open up a whole new vista into time and space.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: This is the latest in Martian exploration, not just from orbit but also from rovers on the ground. New sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on the Red Planet.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: Cubesats, miniature satellites that have been used exclusively in low Earth orbit for 15 years. Now, these tiny satellites are growing in mainstream popularity, and are being used for interplanetary missions as well. They have even been sent to Mars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The evidence to prove some of Einstein's theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now. It appears that Einstein is once again triumphant as we discover the latest in deep space observations.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: We're looking hard, but the numbers aren't stacking up. Is life on other planets really that hard to find? Does it even exist? We have not discovered so much as a signal, so maybe we really are alone in our neck of the galaxy!

programme.title: Super Size Me
programme.desc: Winner at Sundance, director Morgan Spurlock's social experiment in fast-food gastronomy sees him attempting to subsist uniquely on food from the McDonald's menu for an entire month.

programme.title: Super Size Me 2: Holy Chicken!
programme.desc: Morgan Spurlock reignites his battle with the food industry - this time from behind the register - as he opens his own fast food restaurant.

programme.title: Super Volcanoes
programme.desc: They are eruptions so vast, so Earth-shattering, they have changed the history of our planet. Climate collapse. Toxic turmoil. Mass extinction. They are Earth's largest and most destructive Super Volcanoes.

programme.title: Supersize Structures
programme.desc: Explore the tallest towers, the biggest palaces, the grandest tombs and ancient temples that were forgotten for centuries. This episode shows how technique, technology, and ambition have developed some of the most magnificent structures in the world.

programme.desc: The town of Haddonfield, Illinois, celebrates Halloween for the first time in five years, only to be joined in the festivities by maniacal mass murderer Michael Myers, with his nemesis, the inveterate psychiatrist Dr. Loomis, hot on his heels.

programme.title: Halloween H20: 20 Years Later
programme.desc: 20 years ago, evil escaped incarceration in the form of Michael Myers, leading to a bloody killing spree on Halloween. Now, Michael has returned to terrorize a new generation, starting with original final-girl Laurie Strode (Jamie Lee Curtis).

programme.title: Halloween VIII: Resurrection
programme.desc: A group of college students win a contest to spend the night in the childhood home of brutal serial killer Michael Myers. They expect a few scares, but none of them are prepared for what awaits them in this frightening follow-up to HALLOWEEN H20.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: In 1976 a packed coach crashed into the Amazon killing 39 people. When the bodies were pulled out, some had been so viciously mutilated by Piranhas that they could only be identified by their clothes. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates the Piranha.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: In the deep South is a fish reputed to have committed a series of violent attacks on humans. This creature is said to be as vicious as a shark and big as a 'gator. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade heads to Texas to reveal the truth about the Alligator Gar.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: A man swallowed whole by a fish, a body eaten alive from within. Another penetrated in a most unnatural fashion, yet more with multiple stab wounds. Jeremy Wade is in pursuit of some of the Amazon's most notorious flesh eaters.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: No fish inspires the same terror as the shark. A creature with an insatiable hunger for brutal violence. But at least these killers are confined to the oceans. Or are they? Expert angler Jeremy Wade investigates the deadly Bullshark.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to The Mekong River in Thailand in search of one of the world's largest, most terrifying river fish, the Giant Freshwater Stingray. Armed with a venomous 10-inch barbed tail, this 700-pound monster tests Jeremy to his physical limit.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to one of the few rivers left on earth that will still test a fisherman. The Congo, a river steeped in legends, and soaked in violence. One spirit, in particular, is said to lure fishermen from their boats to their deaths.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Ricky Weinhold paid with his life when he tried to keep a bull as a pet. Texas rancher RC Bridges has gone a step further and keeps a huge pet buffalo called Wild Thing. At one time, it even had its own room in the house.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: A tiger loose in the streets of suburban New Jersey tips off locals to a larger and potentially deadly problem. Meanwhile, a man's insistence on keeping tigers costs one person their life.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: A Wisconsin school teacher follows his dream of owning a two-ton Asian elephant but isn't prepared for the inevitable. Doug Terranova, a former circus performer, wants his young daughters to follow in his footsteps.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Three men tempt fate when they bring a buck, a buffalo, and a bull into their lives and homes.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.desc: The buyers stay up north and invade "the city by the bay"... San Francisco, CA.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers venture back to the notorious vault auction, this time in Chattsworth, CA. Jarrod and Brandi find something that makes noise, if not money. Barry Weiss uses "the force."

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Coal Miner's Bigfoot

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: 1, 2, 3, 4, I Declare a Squatch War
programme.desc: The team travels back to the Pacific Northwest to determine the squatchiest state in the U.S. With the team evenly divided and a friendly wager made, Bobo and Cliff head to Oregon while Matt and Ranae head to Washington to see which state is squatchier.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Bigfoot Call of the Wildman
programme.desc: The investigators travel once more to the state of Kentucky to inspect some recent casts of bigfoot tracks. After a wild night with Ernie the Turtleman, they have a terrifying night of their own using Louisville Sluggers for knockers.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The verdict is in for two new pieces of evidence found deep in the Money Pit. Both are ancient and each may be proof of theories that could rewrite the history of the Oak Island mystery.

programme.title: Leyendas urbanas
programme.desc: El vestido de fiesta de una mujer es un éxito, pero no para bien; una pareja descubre el significado de "dar hasta que duela"; y una mujer recibe un trasplante de corazón y pulmón que le da más de lo que esperaba.

programme.title: Leyendas urbanas
programme.desc: La decisión de una mujer de tomar el ascensor resulta ser un gran error; un hombre intenta tomar su cigarro y fumarlo, pero su plan fracasa; y una mujer que decide convertirse en agente secreto se encubrirá.

programme.title: Leyendas urbanas
programme.desc: Un grupo de hermanos va a pescar pero no puede descansar. Los hermanos de la fraternidad escogen a la pareja equivocada y un comandante descubre un misterio que lo deja conmocionado.

programme.title: Leyendas urbanas
programme.desc: Un cadáver señala con el dedo a su asesino. Un hombre intenta escapar del matrimonio y una mujer pilla a su hija en el acto y luego se lleva una sorpresa aún mayor.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre de delito reincidente lleva a la policía por un camino rugoso. Un oficial aconseja a dos adolescentes en un auto estacionado. Unos oficiales le cuentan el secreto a una mujer de su hermano.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía busca a un sospechoso en un barrio y lo encuentran en un aprieto. Se investiga a un auto estacionado detrás de una iglesia. Un oficial aconseja a una madre joven con un pasado problemático.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución a pie termina con el sospechoso en una situación vergonzosa. Un automovilista llama a la policía cuando un peatón pierde la calma. Un hombre arriesga su relación con malas manías.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor se enoja cuando se le interroga. Durante una persecución a coche un hombre le habla a su esposa y la policía se sorprende. Un mentiroso es atrapado y se le da una prueba de inocencia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Con la policía en los talones, el mundo se le cierra a un sospechoso. Una mujer llorando por su esposo violento llama a la policía. Durante un retén alguien intenta escapar de la policía y su pasado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso crea un enorme problema cuando decide huir. Una mujer confiesa sus fallas arriesgando su matrimonio. Los agentes investigan a una sospechosa, pero la amiga termina detenida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Rodeado de oficiales, un pasajero se arriesga. Se enojan dos compañeras cuando una le da de comer huevos a su perro. Un oficial actúa rápido al ver un objeto peligroso en el asiento de un vehículo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un preso en libertad condicional escapa de la policía, pero se le acaba la suerte. Una pareja alega y los vecinos hablan a la policía. Un hombre desorientado tiene un accidente raro y culpa al clima.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una pistola taser se descarga en un sospechoso errático. Un delincuente intenta convencer a los detectives de que no lo vieron cometer ningún crimen. Un oficial supervisa una transacción absurda.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un principiante lamenta su delito y decisiones destructivas. Un conductor no creíble le dice a la policía que es víctima de un crimen. Un oficial anima a una chica con problemas a cambiar su vida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso huyente inventa excusas para evitar la cárcel. Un conductor durmiéndose pide que la policía no le diga a su esposa. Una llamada de allanamiento causa un tormento en un vecindario.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un delincuente corre cuando oficiales lo ven en un lugar prohibido. Dos jóvenes se tardan en detener a un ladrón de bicicletas y llaman a la policía. Un problema domestico se complica malignamente.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre rebelde intenta despistar a los oficiales. Un conductor bien vestido quiebra barricadas. Los oficiales se sorprenden cuando una llamada doméstica da un giro inesperado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Viendo una buena oportunidad un sospechoso va a las carreras. Se atrapa a un hombre con objetos desagradables. Se atrapa a un hombre en una operación encubierta, aun así, no admite su crimen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía intenta atrapar a un sospechoso por robo de vehículo armado. La policía llega a una escena caótica y un testigo aclara las cosas. Un ciclista rezongón culpa su forma de ser en animé.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Alguien con un corazón roto maneja peligrosamente. Se atrapa a un miembro de la Asociación de padres y maestros dando un mal ejemplo. Seguir adelante es difícil para una mujer con un pasado malo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Es como una reunión cuando la policía alcanza a alguien que reconoce. La amante de un hombre hace problemas con la esposa. Los oficiales batallan con dos sospechosos que no dan respuestas concretas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre buscado huye y la policía va muy cerca detrás de él. La policía persigue a una persona manejando nerviosamente. Un retén arriesga a un auto lleno de gente que tiene mucho que ocultar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales se ven obligados a usar guantes cuando detienen a un sospechoso asustado con una condición grave de la piel. Un futuro papá trata de correr. Un rapero empieza a cantar cuando lo esposan.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se somete a un hombre que está convencido que un animal salvaje lo sigue. Un cumpleaños se descontrola rápidamente cuando se involucran las armas. La policía ayuda con un problema domestico volátil.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un barrio tranquilo se interrumpe. Un hombre desafortunado trata de ocultar su culpabilidad al tirar unas prendas. Hay puñetazos cuando un dueño de tienda enfrenta a alguien que le robó.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía encuentra más que golosinas en el bolsillo de un sospechoso. Un conductor armado da un relato no creíble para justificar su arma. Una discusión termina con una llamada a Control Animal.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre llama a la policía cuando ve un robo en la licorería. Un conductor pierde a su amiga cuando le roba su camioneta. Los oficiales le sugieren a un joven que sea mejor ejemplo para su hermano.

programme.title: Looking for Lenny

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Don't miss this rare chance to see the first female comic in history to land her own television special as she's joined by hilarious up-and-comers Mike Cross, Jen Kober and Ali Siddiq.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Saturday Night Live legend Norm Macdonald will have you rolling off the couch when he hosts an hour of standup. Don't miss Norm and four of America's funniest up and coming comedians for an outrageous night of non-stop laughs.

programme.title: Phyllis Diller: Not Just Another Pretty Face
programme.desc: Phyllis Diller's brand of comedy is as timeless today as it was in the 1960s when she became a regular on popular variety and talk shows. Phyllis Diller was a pioneer among female comediennes highlights some of her best routines.

programme.title: George Carlin: Back in Town

programme.title: George Carlin: At Carnegie
programme.desc: Taped before a sold-out house at New York City´s Carnegie Hall, the performance represents a creative resurgence for Carlin, following a heart attack earlier that year.

programme.title: George Carlin Personal Favorites
programme.desc: This HBO special presentation highlights the best of his live performances in Los Angeles, New Jersey, Phoenix, and New York from 1977 to 1998.

programme.title: American: The Bill Hicks Story
programme.desc: A captivating animated documentary on the rollercoaster life of legendary comedian Bill hicks, whose profound and hilarious observations on American life changed the face of modern comedy.

programme.title: Paul Mooney: Analyzing White America (2006)
programme.desc: Paul Mooney is angry, fearless and very funny. Here he takes direct aim at racism and White America and hits his targets with dead-on accuracy and humor.

programme.title: Patrice O'Neal: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Patrice O'Neal expounds on cheating, safe sex and the need for an official Harassment Day.

programme.title: Norm Macdonald: Me Doing Stand-Up
programme.desc: Life's not great, but Norm Macdonald points out that it's better than being dead, even when taking into account the human body's cruelty, the news and the hazards of hope.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A young Enterprise engineer is forced to confront his paralyzing fear of being transported.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Troi is drastically transformed when a visiting ambassador secretly uses her to achieve his aims.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: An emergency beam out renders four crewmen down to childhood shortly before renegade Ferengi take over the Enterprise and offload the adults.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A Holodeck fantasy goes awry, sending Worf and his son into a Wild West showdown with a villain who's a dead ringer for Data.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Data risks Picard and Geordi's lives in order to protect another living machine.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
